data.content: Implementation complete: fixed formatting drift in src/app.rs step_history import, added step_history field to all UpsertKnotHot call sites (sync/apply.rs, snapshots.rs, db/tests.rs, sync test files), added step_history to KnotView/KnotCacheRecord/MetadataProjection initializers across UI/listing/layout/prompt/test files, fixed clippy redundant closure in db.rs. make sanity passes with 390 tests and 95.14% coverage.
